question: Model a `Library` class that maintains a collection of `Book` objects (from a previous question) using aggregation. Implement methods to `addBook()`, `removeBook()`, and `listAllBooks()`.

test_cases.expected:
--- All Books ---
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams, Year: 1979
Title: 1984, Author: George Orwell, Year: 1949
Title: Brave New World, Author: Aldous Huxley, Year: 1932

--- Removing '1984' ---
Book '1984' removed.

--- Books after removal ---
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams, Year: 1979
Title: Brave New World, Author: Aldous Huxley, Year: 1932

--- Attempting to remove non-existent book ---
Book 'Moby Dick' not found.

--- Final Book List ---
Title: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy, Author: Douglas Adams, Year: 1979
Title: Brave New World, Author: Aldous Huxley, Year: 1932

errors: Missing semicolon after class definition for 'Library'.
